title: Officers and Officials: Duties and Requirements of Board Officers
description: The Conroe ISD Board of Trustees has specific officers — such as a president, vice president, and secretary — who each carry defined responsibilities for leading board meetings and managing official business. This policy outlines what those roles require and how they function to keep the board organized and accountable. Understanding these roles helps community members know who to look to for leadership during board meetings and how decisions are structured at the top level of district governance.
